violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Tortilla bowls stored on top of the cook line under the vent. Bucket of food with no lid under the freezer compressor with ice falling from it. Bag box pop stored on the floor in the dry storage.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. Sanitizer clothes out on the prep tables were not being stored in a sanitizer bucket.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours. Rice in the cooler made the night prior had a temperature of 50-55 degrees. Employee discarded the product.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Remove cardboard off shelving in beverage cooler and shelf by the grill. Remove plastic shipping film from side of bar dishwasher, chip container in the bar, microwave on the cook line and on the lower shelf on the cookline. Remove tape on the drawer under the flattop.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs a more thorough cleaning.--Food contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. Clean chip bin in the kitchen and in the bar.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Food trays, carts, racking in the walk-in cooler, and the fan covers in all the walk-in cooler need to be cleaned.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizer was reading 0ppm for the dish machine in the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors, walls and ceiling throughout the facility need to be cleaned.
Lighting. — --Light intensity for walk-in refrigeration or food storage area was insufficient. Lighting for the walk-in freezer was inadequate.
